final:
module top_module (
    input clk,
    input en,
    input [15:0] data,
    output reg [15:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (en)
            q <= data; // Load data into the register
    end

endmodule
